requirement_topic.en: Importer responsibility, API-U / NIB, and entry points
requirement_topic.zh: 进口商责任、API-U/NIB 与入境口岸
requirement_topic.zht: 進口商責任、API-U/NIB 與入境口岸

summary.en: Indonesia market placement for power tools is typically executed with an in-country importer holding API-U and NIB responsibility under the local trade framework. The importer is the practical compliance contact for customs filing, mandatory declarations, and post-clearance traceability, and many practical flows clear through Tanjung Priok in Jakarta and Tanjung Perak in Surabaya.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚市场准入通常由具备 API-U 与 NIB 责任框架的本地进口商执行。进口商是清关、强制申报及清关后可追溯性的实际合规联系人，实际操作中常见入境口岸为雅加达 Tanjung Priok 与泗水 Tanjung Perak。
summary.zht: 印尼市場准入通常由具備 API-U 與 NIB 責任框架的本地進口商執行。進口商是清關、強制申報及清關後可追溯性的實際合規聯絡窗口，實務操作中常見入境口岸為雅加達 Tanjung Priok 與泗水 Tanjung Perak。

standards_or_laws: Indonesian importer registration and customs-facing responsibility model using API-U/NIB context
Kementerian Perindustrian and customs filing linkage for market-facing products
Logistics routing evidence for major entry ports including Tanjung Priok and Tanjung Perak

summary.en: China export documents usually cover PRC-side customs export filing, invoices, and shipment support. They do not replace destination-side API-U/NIB responsibility allocation, local importer registration, and Indonesian customs entry documentation.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件通常覆盖中国侧报关、发票和出口单证，不能替代目的国层面的 API-U/NIB 责任分配、本地进口商备案和印尼海关入境文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件通常覆蓋中國側報關、發票和出口單證，不能替代目的國層面的 API-U/NIB 責任分配、本地進口商備案和印尼海關入境文件要求。

standards_or_laws: PRC domestic export and customs filing framework
Importer documentation that is valid for Chinese customs only
Commodity transport and logistics documents prepared under China-side procedures

gap.en: The market-access gap is usually documentary and legal-persona related. A product can be technically complete for China and still stall in Indonesia if API-U/NIB-linked importer responsibility and port-entry customs filing structure are not arranged with a local party.
gap.zh: 市场准入差距通常是文件与法定主体相关。产品在中国已技术合格仍可能因未按 API-U/NIB 责任安排本地进口方及口岸报关结构而在印尼停滞。
gap.zht: 市場准入差距通常是文件與法定主體相關。產品在中國已技術合格仍可能因未按 API-U/NIB 責任安排本地進口方及口岸報關結構而在印尼停滯。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as a practical entry condition for clearance and responsibility, because customs-facing import filings and post-clearance accountability are managed through the in-country API-U/NIB model.
mandatory_status.cn: China-facing export compliance and customs documents are mandatory for Chinese departure, but they are destination-specific and do not replace an Indonesian API-U/NIB structure.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Indonesia, market readiness depends on the local filing model as much as technical testing. Confirm importer appointment under the API-U/NIB context and plan entry through an actual logistics chain using Tanjung Priok or Tanjung Perak before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对印尼而言，市场准入不仅取决于技术测试，还高度依赖本地备案模式。请先确认 API-U/NIB 下的在地进口方安排，再按 Tanjung Priok 或 Tanjung Perak 的实际物流链路安排出货。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對印尼而言，市場准入不僅取決於技術測試，還高度依賴本地備案模式。請先確認 API-U/NIB 下的在地進口方安排，再按 Tanjung Priok 或 Tanjung Perak 的實際物流鏈路安排出貨。
